name: Feature request
about: Propose a new OCP capability or protocol/runtime improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What limitation are you running into?

## Proposed Change

Describe the capability you want.

## Why It Fits OCP

Explain how it strengthens OCP's direction:

- local-first
- trust-aware
- mission-oriented
- helper-aware
- continuity-oriented

## Notes

Add implementation thoughts, protocol ideas, or UI sketches if useful.
